name: ops
description: Business operations command center for Claude Code. Manage communications, projects, infrastructure, and revenue from your terminal. Includes YOLO mode for autonomous business operation.

telegram_api_id.title: Telegram API ID
telegram_api_id.description: Numeric API ID from https://my.telegram.org/apps. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

telegram_api_hash.title: Telegram API Hash
telegram_api_hash.description: API hash from https://my.telegram.org/apps. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

telegram_phone.title: Telegram Phone Number
telegram_phone.description: Your phone number in E.164 format. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

telegram_session.title: Telegram Session String
telegram_session.description: gram.js StringSession. Optional — run /ops:setup telegram to auto-configure.

aws_region.title: AWS Region
aws_region.description: Default AWS region for infra checks e.g. 'us-east-1' (optional)

klaviyo_private_key.title: Klaviyo Private API Key
klaviyo_private_key.description: Private API key from Klaviyo Settings > API Keys (starts with pk_ or ck_)

meta_ads_token.title: Meta Ads Access Token
meta_ads_token.description: Meta Marketing API access token from Facebook Business

ga4_property_id.title: Google Analytics 4 Property ID
ga4_property_id.description: GA4 property ID (numeric, from Admin > Property Settings)

google_search_console_site.title: Google Search Console Site URL
google_search_console_site.description: Site URL as registered in Search Console (e.g., https://example.com)

shopify_admin_token.title: Shopify Admin API Token
shopify_admin_token.description: Admin API access token from Shopify Partners or custom app

shipbob_access_token.title: ShipBob Access Token
shipbob_access_token.description: ShipBob Personal Access Token for fulfillment tracking (optional)
